papers.title: Neoadjuvant Pembrolizumab plus Chemotherapy in Early Triple-Negative Breast Cancer: ARTEMIS Trial
papers.access_route: Corresponding author contact; MD Anderson tissue procurement core
papers.notes: Treatment-naive TNBC, pre-NACT collection. Paired FFPE + blood makes this high-value for ADC biomarker development.

papers.title: Genomic and transcriptomic characterization of triple-negative breast cancer reveals molecular subtypes and subtype-specific therapeutic vulnerabilities
papers.access_route: BC Cancer biobank request via corresponding author; BC Cancer Research Ethics Board approval required
papers.notes: Large TNBC cohort with matched FFPE + plasma cfDNA. Treatment naive status mixed — verify per patient metadata.

papers.title: Serial liquid biopsies and tumor mutational evolution in metastatic triple-negative breast cancer
papers.access_route: MD Anderson tissue procurement; corresponding author for plasma aliquots
papers.notes: Smaller n=42 with serial plasma — valuable for longitudinal biomarker questions. FFPE archival; treatment history present in cohort.

notes: Both institutions have active biobanks and publish contact-traceable TNBC specimen studies. Pipeline should retrieve on queries combining TNBC + FFPE + treatment-naive + neoadjuvant. BC Cancer Agency paper may not appear in PubMed under PMID 38182588 — verify PMC availability. MD Anderson ARTEMIS (PMID 40801311) is 2025 — may lag in indexing. Serial plasma cohort (PMC8010400) is well-indexed and high-recall.
